Trier · District

Trier-Ost

Trier-Ost covers the Gartenfeld and Heiligkreuz neighborhoods and extends to the slopes leading up toward the Petrisberg. Family-friendly quarters, settled neighborhoods, and short distances into the UNESCO core.

FamilieWohnenGartenfeld

Live prices via Booking. Zoom in, tap a pin, book.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
